hero.subtitle: Guesthouse — Restaurant
hero.description: Discover an oasis of peace and luxury in the heart of Žitný ostrov. Villa Potoň combines elegance with nature for an unforgettable experience.

welcome.title_line3: in the Heart of Žitný Ostrov
welcome.description: Discover a combination of comfortable accommodation, exceptional cuisine and an atmosphere you'll love coming back to.

experience.headline_line1: Experience the atmosphere of true relaxation,
experience.title: Experience the Feeling
experience.subtitle: Accommodation, dining and relaxation under one roof

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.description: Our modern rooms offer everything you need for a pleasant and undisturbed stay. Whether you come for relaxation or a short trip, you'll find comfort you can rely on.

restaurant.title: Restaurant
restaurant.description: Fresh ingredients, a love for food, and chefs who know what they're doing. Our menu features homemade specialties and authentic Neapolitan pizza from an oven brought straight from Italy. Whether you sit down for lunch, dinner or a quiet breakfast, you'll leave with a good feeling.

bar.title: Neapolitan Pizza
bar.description: Our Italian oven made its way from Naples. And the pizza we bake in it is worth the journey. Soft airy dough, quality ingredients and traditional methods. You won't find pizza like this anywhere else on Žitný Ostrov.

breakfast.title: Breakfast
breakfast.description: Start your morning in peace. We serve hot and cold breakfasts right in the restaurant. Fresh pastries, homemade delicacies and good coffee to start your day with energy.

terrace.title: Terrace
terrace.description: Enjoy peaceful moments on the terrace with a pleasant atmosphere, perfect for morning coffee or evening relaxation.

parking.title: Private Parking
parking.description: Villa Potôň has a large private parking lot with capacity for over 30 vehicles, so you never have to worry about parking.

accessibility.title: Rooms for People with Disabilities
accessibility.description: Our facilities are adapted for guests with reduced mobility, so everyone can enjoy a comfortable and carefree stay.

quote.heading: Your comfort and satisfaction are the foundation of every
quote.subtitle: Whether you want to relax in a pleasant environment or enjoy excellent food, you'll find what you're looking for with us.
quote.imageSubtitle: At Villa Potoň, every detail is designed to make you feel at home, with the peace of nature right outside your door.

activities.title: Where Every Day is Created for You

zitny_ostrov.title: Žitný Ostrov
zitny_ostrov.description: Discover the beauty of Žitný Ostrov by the Danube, just a short distance from the villa. Peaceful walks, cycling trails and nature that slows you down.

golf.title: Golf
golf.description: Golf courses near Veľká Paka and Báč, 10 to 15 minutes by car. Ideal for beginners and experienced players alike.

malkia.title: Malkia Park
malkia.description: A unique rescue park with big cats in Orechová Potôň. Just 5 minutes by car.

slovakia_ring.title: Slovakia Ring
slovakia_ring.description: Adrenaline within reach. A racing circuit just 5 minutes from the villa. Racing, go-karts and unforgettable experiences.

thermalpark.title: Thermalpark
thermalpark.description: Thermal pools and wellness in Dunajská Streda, 10 to 15 minutes by car. An ideal program for the whole day.

xbionic.title: X-Bionic Sphere
xbionic.description: A modern sports complex in Šamorín, 20 to 25 minutes by car. An equestrian area, swimming pool, wellness, fitness and activities for children and adults.

booking_cta.title: Book your
booking_cta.description: A reservation at Villa Potôň is the beginning of your relaxation. We'll tailor everything to your comfort.

footer.claim: A place where you feel at home
